lessons.title: Leave room for the part people remember.

image.alt: Folded paper, glass of water, pencil, and soft shadow

lessons.body: The fastest version is not always the smallest one. A little structure up front can make the creative part feel less fragile later, and it gives the weird, memorable part a better chance to survive.
lessons.credit: Shared by the house / edited for the issue

masthead.headline: The week the house started taking notes.

cards.label: Occasions
cards.text: A single weekly block for the things people actually need to remember.

items.label: Birthdays
items.text: No birthdays on the board this week — back to the usual rotation next time.

items.label: Events
items.text: WP team meeting kicks off Monday at 11; Brad and Austin sync Thursday afternoon.

items.label: Milestones
items.text: XXIO Demo Day creative is through QC — carousels and the mp4 masters are in final notes.

items.label: Watch
items.text: Olivia is out this week, so keep Wild Places handoffs clear and front-loaded.

feature.title: Audrey is giving the week somewhere to land.
feature.body: The Digest is becoming a weekly rhythm for the house: a place for the useful links, small wins, sharp moments, and context that should not disappear after one thread.

images.alt: Supporting visual from the highlighted week
Halftone chair landscape over reflective water

businessUnits.title: Summit House first, with notes from the rest of the house.
businessUnits.lead: The week has a place to gather.
businessUnits.note: Summit House leads the read. The agencies stay close behind as sharp single-line signals.

supportingImage.alt: Layered paper and blueprint editorial still life

notes.text: The Digest is moving from good idea to weekly house rhythm.
Campaign review is tightening around the clearest story.
The next shoot plan is simpler, sharper, and easier to hand off.
XXIO Demo Day cut is in final QC, with the team regrouping Monday to close it out.
The handoff layer is getting quieter, which usually means it is working.
The latest social pull has a brighter thread worth keeping in the house mix.

sharing.title: Seen in the feed, saved for the house.
sharing.body: A weekly pull from the posts, screenshots, launches, and small public signals worth bringing back into the room.

posts.title: A studio update is only useful if people can find it again.
posts.caption: House signal
posts.alt: LinkedIn post visual placeholder for Summit House

posts.title: The best campaign notes tend to sound obvious once they are finally clear.
posts.caption: Campaign note
posts.alt: LinkedIn post visual placeholder for Oust

posts.title: A production still can carry more context than a paragraph.
posts.caption: Set note
posts.alt: LinkedIn post visual placeholder for Ritual

posts.title: A good effect should feel like a point of view, not a dropdown.
posts.caption: Tool note
posts.alt: LinkedIn post visual placeholder for Wild Places

posts.title: A small social moment can still carry the whole mood of the week.
posts.caption: Social note
